title: rubus tereticaulis var. clivicola
intro: Rubus tereticaulis var. clivicola, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a variant of the Rubus tereticaulis plant species. This shrub-like plant is native to the Himalayan regions and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory infections, offering benefits such as improved digestion, reduced inflammation, and boosted immunity. In herbal preparations, Rubus tereticaulis var. clivicola is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves and roots can also be used in homemade remedies and cosmetics.
